title: For a New Venture
scripture_text: Be strong and courageous. Do not be frightened or dismayed, for the Lord your God is with you wherever you go.
reflection: The venture will not save you. But it might be the way the Lord saves you through. The venture is the door; the Lord is the destination.
body:
You are starting something. A business. A book. A marriage. A move. A new thing that you have never done before, and that you are not sure you are ready for.

You are not ready. That is the point. The Lord does not look for ready. He looks for available.

He will be with you in the middle of it. He will be with you in the failures, and the small wins, and the long, quiet, middle parts where nothing is happening and you wonder if you are doing it wrong.

He is doing it through you. The work is His. The calling is His. The outcome is His. You are only the hands.

That is enough. Be the hands.
prayer: Lord, I am starting. Hold my hand. Be with me in the middle. Bring it to what You have planned. Amen.
